currentGoal.description: The single active goal the cockpit should keep in view.

nextAction.description: The one concrete next action that moves the active goal forward.

proofNeeded.description: The evidence that will prove the next action is complete.

parkingLot.description: Bounded distracting-but-valid ideas that should not become the next action.

handoff.description: Optional concise prompt for continuing the same goal in another turn or agent.

assumptions.description: Bounded assumptions that shaped this cockpit state.

blockers.description: Bounded blockers or missing facts that prevent straightforward progress.
